Transcription WER Analysis

Intelligent Word Error Rate analysis for 10 MIH system transcription samples.
Spelling variants, compound words and greeting forms are normalised before scoring.

Recording Environment

  • Indoor room setting
  • Quiet ambience with minimal background noise
  • Faint fan sound audible in the background
  • No traffic noise or external disturbances
  • Generally controlled, low-noise environment suitable for clear audio capture
WER < 20% — Good WER 20–40% — Moderate WER > 40% — High

Overall Summary

wordSubstitution — wrong word wordInsertion — extra in MIH [word]Deletion — missing from MIH Hover a substitution to see what was expected.
